jobs.title: System Analyst
jobs.description: Dicari seorang System Analyst yang mampu bekerja secara mumpuni dalam kompleksitas sistem enterprise secara praktis dan teori. Kandidat ideal adalah individu yang mampu menjembatani kebutuhan bisnis dengan eksekusi teknis, serta menghasilkan rancangan (design) yang dapat diimplementasikan. Posisi ini membutuhkan fondasi teknis yang kuat, kemampuan analisis yang tajam, serta kemampuan berkolaborasi secara efektif dengan pemangku kepentingan (stakeholder), baik dari sisi teknis maupun non-teknis.

Kualifikasi Wajib (Non-Negotiable)

  • Memiliki pengalaman 5 tahun sebagai system analyst
  • Memiliki sarjana (S1) teknologi dan sebanding
  • Memiliki pengalaman coding / pengembangan perangkat lunak secara langsung (hands-on) — ini adalah syarat mutlak, karena membedakan rancangan yang benar-benar dapat diimplementasikan dari sekadar dokumen yang terlihat masuk akal
  • Memiliki pengalaman terkait sistem enterprise, mencakup integrasi sistem, alur kerja (workflow), dan Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
  • Memiliki pengalaman dalam requirements traceability (penelusuran kebutuhan)
  • Mahir dalam pembuatan artefak desain (misalnya BPMN, sequence diagram, activity diagram, dan diagram Mermaid)

Nilai Tambah yang Kuat (Strong Advantage)

  • Memahami data modelling, termasuk Conceptual Data Model (CDM), Logical Data Model (LDM), dan Entity-Relationship Diagram (ERD)
  • Memiliki literasi dalam desain API, termasuk pemahaman terhadap spesifikasi OpenAPI dan OAuth
  • Mampu menggunakan tools AI (AI-augmented engineering, termasuk agentic tools) secara kritis dan efektif
  • Memiliki kemampuan fasilitasi stakeholder yang baik, termasuk elisitasi kebutuhan dan penyelesaian konflik

Dapat Dipelajari Selama Bekerja (Trainable on the Job)

  • Familiar dengan tools diagram berbasis declarative
  • Pemahaman mendalam terhadap tech stack proyek tertentu
  • Pengetahuan spesifik terhadap domain bisnis
  • Kesadaran terhadap aspek keamanan (security) dalam desain sistem

jobs.title: Data Innovation Engineer Internship
jobs.description: Tertarik mengembangkan solusi berbasis Artificial Intelligence (AI), data engineering, dan analytics di industri pembiayaan? Bergabunglah bersama BFI Finance dan dapatkan pengalaman mengerjakan proyek nyata yang memberikan dampak bagi bisnis. Mempelajari penerapan AI dalam industri pembiayaan. Mengembangkan solusi AI menggunakan Prompt Engineering dan LLM API. Mengolah dan menganalisis data menggunakan Python dan SQL. Membantu membangun data pipeline dan dashboard Business Intelligence (BI). Berkolaborasi dengan tim dalam mengembangkan solusi berbasis data dan AI.

jobs.description: 1. Memimpin end-to-end migrasi OCP → AWS ROSA. 2. Menyusun dan mengelola project plan, timeline, dan milestone. 3. Mengawasi fase testing dan memastikan production readiness.

jobs.title: Website & SEO Specialist
jobs.description: Manage, maintain, and optimize the company's corporate website to ensure content accuracy, functionality, performance, and user experience. Execute end-to-end SEO strategies, including keyword research, on-page SEO, technical SEO, and link-building initiatives to improve organic search performance. Monitor, analyze, and optimize website traffic, user behavior, and performance using analytics tools to support continuous improvement. Plan, execute, and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, and Performance Max) to support business objectives. Optimize website structure, page speed, mobile responsiveness, indexing, and technical SEO in accordance with search engine best practices. Manage website content through CMS platforms and perform basic HTML, CSS, or JavaScript updates when required. Collaborate with content, design, IT, and marketing teams to enhance website functionality and deliver integrated digital campaigns. Monitor website health, identify technical issues, and coordinate with internal teams or external vendors to ensure optimal website performance.

jobs.title: Carrier Development Representative
jobs.description: About Expedock We at Expedock are reinventing the multi-trillion-dollar industry of global shipping and supply chain by harnessing the power of artificial intelligence and data processing. We collaborate with leading logistics businesses worldwide, helping them streamline their intricate logistics processes and enhance transparency. Who We Need We're looking for a driven and confident Sales Development Representative (SDR) who enjoys building relationships and creating new business opportunities. In this role, you'll use telemarketing and email outreach to engage and pre-qualify prospective carriers, initiate meaningful conversations, and generate qualified leads for the sales team. If you're proactive, goal-oriented, and thrive in a fast-paced environment, we'd love to hear from you. What You'll Do: Prospect and Build Carrier Pipeline Identify and research prospective carriers. Conduct outbound calls and email outreach to introduce partnership opportunities. Generate qualified carrier leads. Qualify Carriers Assess carriers based on operating authority, insurance, equipment, service coverage, capacity, and compliance. Educate carriers on the benefits of joining the client's carrier network. Guide qualified carriers through the onboarding process or hand them off to the appropriate team. Collaboration Work closely with Carrier Success, Operations, or Carrier Onboarding teams to ensure a smooth transition. Pipeline & CRM Track outreach, qualification status, onboarding progress, and carrier engagement in the CRM.

About Expedock

We at Expedock are reinventing the multi-trillion-dollar industry of global shipping and supply chain by harnessing the power of artificial intelligence and data processing. We collaborate with leading logistics businesses worldwide, helping them streamline their intricate logistics processes and enhance transparency.

Who We Need

We're looking for a driven and confident Sales Development Representative (SDR) who enjoys building relationships and creating new business opportunities.

In this role, you'll use telemarketing and email outreach to engage and pre-qualify prospective carriers, initiate meaningful conversations, and generate qualified leads for the sales team. If you're proactive, goal-oriented, and thrive in a fast-paced environment, we'd love to hear from you.

What You'll Do:

  • Prospect and Build Carrier Pipeline
    • Identify and research prospective carriers.
    • Conduct outbound calls and email outreach to introduce partnership opportunities.
    • Generate qualified carrier leads.
  • Qualify Carriers
    • Assess carriers based on operating authority, insurance, equipment, service coverage, capacity, and compliance.
    • Educate carriers on the benefits of joining the client's carrier network.
    • Guide qualified carriers through the onboarding process or hand them off to the appropriate team.
  • Collaboration
    • Work closely with Carrier Success, Operations, or Carrier Onboarding teams to ensure a smooth transition.
  • Pipeline & CRM
    • Track outreach, qualification status, onboarding progress, and carrier engagement in the CRM.


", "distance_from_user": -1, "education_level": 550, "es_is_top_brand": false, "es_recruiter_last_seen": "2026-07-08T07:59:42.635844+00:00", "exam_versions": [], "function": "Supply Chain", "google_location": {"address_components": {"address_line_1": "1160, Battery St, Embarcadero", "city": "San Francisco", "country": "United States", "region": "California"}}, "id": 269565, "is_featured": false, "is_hybrid": false, "is_open_to_fresh_grads": false, "is_work_from_home": true, "job_sds_skills": [], "maximum_salary": null, "name": "Carrier Development Representative", "number_of_openings": 1, "perks": {"other": null, "types": ["wfh"]}, "photo_urls": [], "priority_score": 0.5, "qualifications": "

What You Need:

  • Bachelor's degree in Business, Logistics, Supply Chain Management, Marketing, or a related field is preferred.
  • At least 2–4 years of experience in Sales Development, Business Development, Carrier Sales, Carrier Procurement, Freight Brokerage, or a similar outbound sales role within the logistics industry.
  • Experience in truckload (FTL), freight brokerage, carrier procurement, or transportation is highly preferred.
  • Proven experience in cold calling, telemarketing, email outreach, and lead qualification.
  • Strong understanding of the transportation and logistics industry, including carrier operations, freight brokerage, and supply chain concepts.
  • Excellent English communication skills (C1 proficiency), both written and verbal.
  • Strong negotiation, persuasion, and relationship-building skills.
  • Ability to work independently, manage multiple priorities, and consistently meet outreach and performance targets.
  • Experience using CRM platforms (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, or similar) to manage pipelines and document customer interactions.
  • Familiarity with load boards, carrier databases, or Transportation Management Systems (TMS) is an advantage.
  • Customer-focused, highly organized, and results-driven with strong problem-solving skills.
  • Willing and able to work the night shift.


Candidate Data & Privacy Notice

By submitting your application to Expedock, you acknowledge and consent to the collection, use, and processing of your personal information for recruitment and hiring purposes. Your information will be used to:

  • Evaluate your qualifications and suitability for current and future roles
  • Communicate with you throughout the recruitment process Improve our hiring processes and overall candidate experience
  • Maintain talent pools for future opportunities, where permitted by law

We handle candidate data with care and in accordance with applicable data protection and privacy regulations. Your information will only be accessed by authorized team members and will not be shared with third parties without your consent, unless required by law.

jobs.title: Finance, Accounting and Tax Spv
jobs.description: Tugas & Tanggung Jawab 1. Melakukan pencatatan dan pembukuan transaksi keuangan perusahaan 2.     2. Pengalaman kerja minimal 2 tahun di bidang Accounting, Finance, dan/atau Tax terutama di perusahaan terbuka (tbk)
    3. Memahami prinsip akuntansi (PSAK) dan laporan keuangan baik audited maupun non-audited, Laporan XBRL/Bursa/OJK.

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Design, build, and maintain automated CI/CD deployment pipelines to improve deployment efficiency, consistency, and reliability. Enhance and optimize existing deployment pipelines to support evolving application and infrastructure requirements. Provide technical support for application deployment activities , ensuring successful releases across development, testing, and production environments. Perform security and vulnerability scanning on source code, applications, and deployment pipelines to identify potential security risks. Analyze and validate identified vulnerabilities, assess their impact, and coordinate remediation efforts with development and infrastructure teams. Prepare and communicate vulnerability assessment reports , providing recommendations and tracking remediation progress with developers. Monitor CI/CD pipeline performance and troubleshoot build or deployment failures to ensure continuous delivery. Collaborate with development, QA, and infrastructure teams to improve deployment automation, application security, and operational efficiency. Support continuous improvement initiatives by implementing DevOps best practices and enhancing deployment and security processes.

Memastikan seluruh materi visual yang dihasilkan sesuai dengan identitas dan standar branding perusahaan.

jobs.title: Sustainability Associate
jobs.description: Collect, process , and analyze sustainability (ESG) data on a regular basis (monthly, quarterly, annually) to support management decision-making. Support the preparation of the Company’s Sustainability Report, ensuring accuracy, timeliness, and compliance with applicable standards (POJK 51/2017, GRI Standards, and SASB). Develop, design, and implement sustainability programs aligned with the company’s strategy. Drive and integrate sustainability initiatives into daily operations, including: Energy efficiency and resource optimization Emissions reduction and waste management Circular economy practices Greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions calculation and reporting I ntegrate ESG principles across business functions and help build internal awareness around sustainability. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure effective implementation of sustainability initiatives . Coordinate with external stakeholders to support and enhance the company’s sustainability performance. Handle ESG-related data requests and disclosures from external parties , including for ESG ratings, sustainability indices, and investor relations purposes. Monitor, evaluate, and report on sustainability KPIs . Support the implementation of the company’s Creating Shared Value (CSV) programs.

Good command of English , both written and spoken. Strong interest and passion in sustainability, ESG, and impact-driven initiatives. A team player who enjoys collaborating with others.

jobs.title: Virtual Teammate — Help Grow a Marketplace for University Students — Fully Remote, Training Provided
jobs.description: Hi! I'm the founder of SUpost, the trusted online marketplace for the university communities. We're the go-to spot where university students buy and sell stuff, find roommates, score concert tickets, hire tutors, and connect with each other. Think of us as the friendly, university-only version of Facebook Marketplace, OLX or Craigslist — except people actually trust us. We serve 131,000 users every year, we're profitable, and we've been around for over a decade. Now we're ready for our next adventure: expanding to more elite universities around the world — and we want you on the team to help make it happen. This isn't a role where you'll be stuck in spreadsheets all day (though we do love a good spreadsheet). You'll be working directly with me, the founder, on the actual fun stuff that makes a startup grow. What You'll Actually Do (the fun part) Business development — help us figure out which universities to launch in next and how to win them over Customer discovery — talk to real students, learn what they love (and hate), and bring those insights back to shape the product Product design input — share ideas on how the website should look, feel, and work for students Campus outreach — help us reach students at new universities and grow our community Founder collaboration — brainstorm, strategize, and execute together on growth experiments You'll learn what it actually takes to scale an online marketplace — not in theory, but by doing it. Tools We Use Google Sheets & Docs Dropbox Paper Telegram Zoom / Google Meet for video calls Why This Role Is Awesome Direct mentorship from a Stanford grad (PhD, MS, BS — yes, all three!) Real ownership — you'll work on the things that move the needle, not coffee runs or busy work Fully remote — work from home, in your favorite hoodie Flexible hours — we care about results, not clock-watching Clear path to grow into Senior Operations, Team Lead, or Business/Strategy roles International team — you'll be working with people who genuinely care about building something meaningful Learn how startups really work — the messy, exciting, "we're figuring it out together" version Who This Role Is Perfect For A curious, motivated early-career professional Someone who wants to build, not just check boxes A future leader who wants to grow alongside a startup Anyone interested in marketplaces, tech, business development, or product Ateneo and top-university graduates who want global exposure and real responsibility Location Philippines (or wherever you call home) Fully remote (work from home) Open to future relocation opportunities Salary Discussed during interview Base pay + performance-based incentives (because when we grow, you grow) Perks & Benefits Flexitime Work from home Mentorship & career development Real startup experience (not the buzzword kind)

Hi! I'm the founder of SUpost, the trusted online marketplace for the university communities. We're the go-to spot where university students buy and sell stuff, find roommates, score concert tickets, hire tutors, and connect with each other. Think of us as the friendly, university-only version of Facebook Marketplace, OLX or Craigslist — except people actually trust us.

We serve 131,000 users every year, we're profitable, and we've been around for over a decade. Now we're ready for our next adventure: expanding to more elite universities around the world — and we want you on the team to help make it happen.

This isn't a role where you'll be stuck in spreadsheets all day (though we do love a good spreadsheet). You'll be working directly with me, the founder, on the actual fun stuff that makes a startup grow.

What You'll Actually Do (the fun part)

  • Business development — help us figure out which universities to launch in next and how to win them over
  • Customer discovery — talk to real students, learn what they love (and hate), and bring those insights back to shape the product
  • Product design input — share ideas on how the website should look, feel, and work for students
  • Campus outreach — help us reach students at new universities and grow our community
  • Founder collaboration — brainstorm, strategize, and execute together on growth experiments
  • You'll learn what it actually takes to scale an online marketplace — not in theory, but by doing it.

Tools We Use

  • Google Sheets & Docs
  • Dropbox Paper
  • Telegram
  • Zoom / Google Meet for video calls

Why This Role Is Awesome

  • Direct mentorship from a Stanford grad (PhD, MS, BS — yes, all three!)
  • Real ownership — you'll work on the things that move the needle, not coffee runs or busy work
  • Fully remote — work from home, in your favorite hoodie
  • Flexible hours — we care about results, not clock-watching
  • Clear path to grow into Senior Operations, Team Lead, or Business/Strategy roles
  • International team — you'll be working with people who genuinely care about building something meaningful
  • Learn how startups really work — the messy, exciting, "we're figuring it out together" version

Who This Role Is Perfect For

  • A curious, motivated early-career professional
  • Someone who wants to build, not just check boxes
  • A future leader who wants to grow alongside a startup
  • Anyone interested in marketplaces, tech, business development, or product
  • Ateneo and top-university graduates who want global exposure and real responsibility

Location

  • Philippines (or wherever you call home)
  • Fully remote (work from home)
  • Open to future relocation opportunities

Salary

  • Discussed during interview
  • Base pay + performance-based incentives (because when we grow, you grow)

Perks & Benefits

  • Flexitime
  • Work from home
  • Mentorship & career development
  • Real startup experience (not the buzzword kind)

jobs.title: Business Development Supervisor Animal Food
jobs.description: Develop and maintain strong relationships with existing B2B customers to ensure customer satisfaction and repeat business. Identify, approach, and acquire new customers to expand the company's market presence and achieve sales growth. Prepare and submit quotations, proposals, and project tender documents in a timely and accurate manner. Provide technical and commercial support to customers throughout the sales process. Conduct customer visits, presentations, and product demonstrations to promote company products and services. Negotiate pricing, commercial terms, and contracts with customers. Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer requirements to identify new business opportunities. Follow up on sales inquiries, quotations, and project opportunities to maximize conversion rates. Coordinate with internal departments to ensure smooth order processing, delivery, and after-sales support. Prepare sales reports, forecasts, and customer activity updates while ensuring achievement of assigned sales targets independently.

jobs.title: Network & IoT Officer at PT Kawasan Industri Terpadu Batang member of PT Danareksa Persero
jobs.description: Operasional Infrastruktur Digital Mengoperasikan jaringan internet, fiber optic, WiFi zone, dan infrastruktur IoT yang menjadi lingkup layanan departemen. Memastikan layanan konektivitas berjalan sesuai kebutuhan tenant dan operasional kawasan. Menjaga ketersediaan layanan infrastruktur digital pada kondisi operasional normal. Monitoring Jaringan dan IoT Memantau kondisi jaringan, perangkat konektivitas, dan node/perangkat IoT secara berkala. Mengidentifikasi gangguan, penurunan performa, atau anomali pada sistem jaringan dan IoT. Mencatat hasil monitoring sebagai dasar tindakan korektif dan evaluasi. Pemeliharaan Infrastruktur Digital Melaksanakan preventive maintenance pada perangkat jaringan dan infrastruktur IoT. Memastikan perangkat digital dalam kondisi siap operasi. Mencatat hasil pemeliharaan untuk kebutuhan histori peralatan dan evaluasi. Penanganan Gangguan Jaringan dan IoT Mengidentifikasi penyebab gangguan konektivitas, jaringan, atau perangkat IoT. Melakukan tindakan awal perbaikan dan pemulihan layanan digital. Berkoordinasi dengan vendor atau pihak terkait untuk penanganan lanjutan bila diperlukan. Pengamanan dan Keandalan Infrastruktur Digital Memastikan konfigurasi dasar dan operasional perangkat mendukung keamanan dan keandalan layanan. Mengidentifikasi potensi risiko operasional pada jaringan dan perangkat digital. Menyampaikan kebutuhan tindak lanjut terkait keamanan dan reliability kepada atasan atau pihak terkait. Dukungan Layanan Digital Mendukung kebutuhan teknis tenant atau unit terkait terhadap layanan jaringan dan IoT. Menindaklanjuti keluhan atau gangguan layanan digital di lapangan. Berkoordinasi dengan fungsi proyek atau vendor untuk memastikan kelancaran layanan. Pelaporan Operasional Infrastruktur Digital Mengisi logsheet operasional jaringan dan IoT. Menyusun laporan gangguan, maintenance, dan kondisi infrastruktur digital. Menyampaikan laporan operasional sebagai bahan monitoring dan evaluasi atasan. Manajemen dan Mitigasi Risiko Melakukan identifikasi, pengelolaan, pelaporan, kontrol, dan evaluasi mitigasi risiko secara berkala dengan memperhatikan target dan kebijakan risiko sesuai alur proses bisnis dan faktornya, serta memperhatikan aspek risiko dalam setiap keputusan dan ikut dalam program pengembangan budaya risiko.

"created_at": "2026-05-07T07:11:47.545743+00:00", "description": "

Operasional Infrastruktur Digital

  • Mengoperasikan jaringan internet, fiber optic, WiFi zone, dan infrastruktur IoT yang menjadi lingkup layanan departemen.

  • Memastikan layanan konektivitas berjalan sesuai kebutuhan tenant dan operasional kawasan.

  • Menjaga ketersediaan layanan infrastruktur digital pada kondisi operasional normal.

Monitoring Jaringan dan IoT

  • Memantau kondisi jaringan, perangkat konektivitas, dan node/perangkat IoT secara berkala.

  • Mengidentifikasi gangguan, penurunan performa, atau anomali pada sistem jaringan dan IoT.

  • Mencatat hasil monitoring sebagai dasar tindakan korektif dan evaluasi.

Pemeliharaan Infrastruktur Digital

  • Melaksanakan preventive maintenance pada perangkat jaringan dan infrastruktur IoT.

  • Memastikan perangkat digital dalam kondisi siap operasi.

  • Mencatat hasil pemeliharaan untuk kebutuhan histori peralatan dan evaluasi.

Penanganan Gangguan Jaringan dan IoT

  • Mengidentifikasi penyebab gangguan konektivitas, jaringan, atau perangkat IoT.

  • Melakukan tindakan awal perbaikan dan pemulihan layanan digital.

  • Berkoordinasi dengan vendor atau pihak terkait untuk penanganan lanjutan bila diperlukan.

Pengamanan dan Keandalan Infrastruktur Digital

  • Memastikan konfigurasi dasar dan operasional perangkat mendukung keamanan dan keandalan layanan.

  • Mengidentifikasi potensi risiko operasional pada jaringan dan perangkat digital.

  • Menyampaikan kebutuhan tindak lanjut terkait keamanan dan reliability kepada atasan atau pihak terkait.

Dukungan Layanan Digital

  • Mendukung kebutuhan teknis tenant atau unit terkait terhadap layanan jaringan dan IoT.

  • Menindaklanjuti keluhan atau gangguan layanan digital di lapangan.

  • Berkoordinasi dengan fungsi proyek atau vendor untuk memastikan kelancaran layanan.

Pelaporan Operasional Infrastruktur Digital

  • Mengisi logsheet operasional jaringan dan IoT.

  • Menyusun laporan gangguan, maintenance, dan kondisi infrastruktur digital.

  • Menyampaikan laporan operasional sebagai bahan monitoring dan evaluasi atasan.

Manajemen dan Mitigasi Risiko

  • Melakukan identifikasi, pengelolaan, pelaporan, kontrol, dan evaluasi mitigasi risiko secara berkala dengan memperhatikan target dan kebijakan risiko sesuai alur proses bisnis dan faktornya, serta memperhatikan aspek risiko dalam setiap keputusan dan ikut dalam program pengembangan budaya risiko.

Directly report to Chief of Sales and Marketing.

jobs.title: Executive Assistant
jobs.description: Manage and maintain the Board Member’s calendars, ensuring all meetings, events, and travel plans are efficiently scheduled and prioritized. Prepare meeting materials, presentations, and reports, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and confidentiality. Organize and coordinate Board and management meetings, including agenda preparation, documentation, and minute-taking. Follow up on key action items and decisions from Board and leadership meetings to ensure timely execution. Handle confidential correspondence, contracts, and internal communications with professionalism and discretion. Act as liaison between the Board, senior management, and external partners, ensuring effective and professional communication. Coordinate complex travel arrangements, including itineraries, logistics, and expense management. Support corporate governance processes, such as maintaining Board documents, approvals, and compliance-related materials. Conduct light research and data gathering to prepare executive summaries or background information as required. Assist with special projects and events on behalf of the Board, ensuring smooth coordination and high-quality execution. Execute all purchase settlements of expenses related to Board member’s usage in daily operations. Ad-hoc Functions: Managing day-to-day operation of services to all Board members including mobilizations, dining preparations and other arrangements related to Board member’s activities. with General Affairs & Human Capital departments. Ensuring condition of Board member’s residences, formalities and families by coordinating with General Affair Department. Assiting Board member’s in conducting visits and other activities related to Company Clients & Guests such as Networking, Seminars and Business Meetings

{"activation_date": "2026-07-06T07:54:03.019431+00:00", "application_end_date": "2027-07-06T07:54:03.019431+00:00", "apply_redirect_url": null, "base_salary": null, "bookmarked": false, "company": {"code": "gimcyazzprjjyfx", "description": "Our History

PT. MASTERSYSTEM INFOTAMA (MSI) was established in July 1994. Through the long journey, Mastersystem has developed into one of the leading ICT infrastructures providers and dominates not only the enterprise banking market in Indonesia, but also in oil and gas, enterprise and telecommunication industry.

Headquartered in Jakarta, MSI has branch office in Surabaya, East Java. MSI has more than 400 employees now with the majority are certified professionals.

As our commitment to deliver high quality standard of services, we comply with ISO standard i.e. ISO 9001:2015 (Quality Management) and ISO/IEC 20000-1:2011 (IT Service Management) to serve our customers better.

1994 Establishment as a PC distributor
1996- 1999 Beginning of network and system integration business, Clients: 20
2004 Cisco Gold Partner, Microsoft Large Account Reseller, HP First Tier Partner, Clients: 60,
2009 Beginning of data driven solution era, Clients: 140
2011 Virtual Desktop Infrastructure
2013 - 2014 Security Analytics and Contact Center, Clients: 250
2016 Big Data Analytics and API Gateway, Clients: 500
2018 - Now Next Gen Technologies (AI, IoT), Focus on Intellectual Property, Clients: 1000+

Why Mastersystem Infotama

Driven by technology powered business innovation and committed to bridge the gap between technology and business needs, we empowering business by building, integrating, and providing consultation the customers need.

Proven track record of success selling in a highly competitive environment, Mastersystem Infotama offers decades of experience to deliver quality solutions and help your organization to stay on top of the market trends and strengthening your value propositions to keep growing.


Awards & Recognitions

Mastersystem Infotama - 2018 Infoblox Top ASEAN Partner of the Year
Mastersystem Infotama - 2018 Cisco Most Innovative Partner of the Year
Mastersystem Infotama - 2018 Cloudera Strategic Deal of the Year
Mastersystem Infotama - 2018 Redhat Ready Partner of the Year
Mastersystem Infotama - 2018 Cisco APJC Digital Innovation Award
Mastersystem Infotama - 2017 Cisco Partner of the Year
Mastersystem Infotama - 2017 Microsoft Country Partner of the Year
Mastersystem Infotama - 2017 Citrix ASEAN Special Recognition
Mastersystem Infotama - 2017 HP Fastest Growing Hybrid IT Corporate Reseller & PS


Our Vision, Mission & Value

Vision
To be Indonesia leader in ICT industry.

Mission
Bring value to all the stakeholders.
Empowering business with innovative technologies, solutions and services.

Our Core Value
E excellence
T teamwork
H honesty

jobs.title: Videographer dan Editor
jobs.description: - Memiliki sense visual yang baik dan mampu menampilkan talent agar terlihat menarik, estetik, dan sesuai dengan konsep konten. - ⁠Menguasai teknik pengambilan video (framing, angle, camera movement, dan lighting) - ⁠Mampu membangun mood video melalui pemilihan angle, pencahayaan, dan suasana sekitar. - ⁠Memahami beat dan ritme musik sehingga hasil pengambilan gambar selaras dengan alur lagu. - ⁠Bertanggung jawab menghasilkan raw footage yang berkualitas, dengan memperhatikan fokus, pencahayaan, komposisi, dan kestabilan video agar siap masuk ke proses editing. - ⁠Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim. - ⁠Problem solving, inisiatif tinggi, komunikatif dan detail oriented - ⁠Memiliki kemampuan dasar editing video menjadi nilai tambah.

jobs.title: Junior DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information System or related field. Minimum 1 year of experience as a DevOps/DevSecOps Engineer or in a similar role. Hands-on experience with Java and Node.js applications (Express.js, React.js, React Native). Strong understanding of application build and deployment processes in Linux environments. Familiarity with Microservices Architecture and container orchestration platforms such as Kubernetes or OpenShift (OCP). Good knowledge of Linux operating systems (Windows administration is a plus). Experience managing repositories, artifacts, and CI/CD pipelines. Ability to create and modify deployment automation scripts. Strong troubleshooting, documentation, and communication skills. Able to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams and support production deployments.

jobs.title: Senior Sales Executive
jobs.description: Key Responsibilities Manage the entire sales cycle (prospecting-discovery-solution proposing-presentation-negotiating-closing). Able to follow up on customer business requirements post-implementation to identify additional potential opportunities. Negotiate and close agreements with clients. Create Quotation for customers. Create Sales Orders and Profit & Loss Calculation. Work closely with the product and service teams to deliver tailored solutions to customers. Monitor customer satisfaction levels and address any concerns or issues. Proactively engage with customers to ensure their ongoing success and loyalty. Build and maintain strong relationships with Customer and Principles. Conduct and organize routine events in collaboration with the principal, partner and customers.

jobs.title: Project Development at PT Kawasan Industri Terpadu Batang member of PT Danareksa Persero
jobs.description: Perencanaan Pengembangan Infrastruktur Digital Mengumpulkan kebutuhan infrastruktur digital dari tenant dan unit terkait di dalam kawasan. Menyusun kebutuhan teknis awal untuk pengembangan jaringan internet, fiber optic, WiFi zone, dan IoT. Menyelaraskan rencana pengembangan infrastruktur digital dengan kebutuhan operasional tenant dan rencana pengembangan kawasan. Pelaksanaan Proyek Infrastruktur Digital Menyiapkan kebutuhan pelaksanaan proyek infrastruktur digital sesuai ruang lingkup pekerjaan. Mengoordinasikan pelaksanaan proyek dengan vendor, kontraktor, dan pihak internal terkait. Memantau progres proyek agar berjalan sesuai target waktu, mutu, dan kebutuhan operasional. Monitoring Kualitas dan Progres Proyek Melakukan monitoring atas kemajuan pekerjaan proyek digital di lapangan. Memeriksa kesesuaian hasil pekerjaan dengan kebutuhan teknis dan ruang lingkup proyek. Mengidentifikasi hambatan proyek dan menyampaikan kebutuhan tindak lanjut kepada atasan atau pihak terkait. Dukungan Implementasi Smart Industrial Estate Mendukung implementasi infrastruktur digital yang dibutuhkan untuk smart industrial estate. Mengoordinasikan kebutuhan konektivitas dan kesiapan infrastruktur proyek digital pendukung. Memberikan masukan teknis terkait integrasi infrastruktur digital dalam pengembangan kawasan. Koordinasi Mitra dan Vendor Proyek Berkoordinasi dengan vendor, provider, dan kontraktor dalam pelaksanaan proyek digital. Memastikan kebutuhan teknis dan dokumen pelaksanaan proyek tersedia. Mendukung evaluasi awal terhadap pelaksanaan pekerjaan oleh mitra proyek. Pelaporan Kegiatan Proyek Menyusun laporan progres pelaksanaan proyek infrastruktur digital. Mendokumentasikan hasil pekerjaan, kendala, dan tindak lanjut proyek. Menyampaikan laporan proyek kepada atasan sebagai dasar monitoring dan evaluasi. Manajemen dan Mitigasi Risiko Melakukan identifikasi, pengelolaan, pelaporan, kontrol, dan evaluasi mitigasi risiko secara berkala dengan memperhatikan target dan kebijakan risiko sesuai alur proses bisnis dan faktornya, serta memperhatikan aspek risiko dalam setiap keputusan dan ikut dalam program pengembangan budaya risiko.

jobs.title: Application Support for SaaS
jobs.description: Role Overview The Application Support Specialist is responsible for ensuring the smooth operation of software applications by providing first and second-line support to clients and internal users. This role acts as the critical bridge between end users, Product Managers, and Engineers — receiving issues, diagnosing root causes, and coordinating resolution efficiently. The ideal candidate is technically curious, a clear communicator, and comfortable working across functional teams in a fast-paced environment.

jobs.title: Gold Business Manager Jawa Timur
jobs.description: Deskripsi Pekerjaan: 1. Bertanggung jawab memimpin dan mengelola Gold Officer dalam koordinasinya untuk mencapai target bisnis. 2. Bertanggung jawab memastikan dijalankannya disiplin proses bisnis Gadai sesuai ketentuan. 3. Pertanggung jawab dalam hal internal control penaksiran ulang terhadap barang jaminan yang diserahkan oleh Gold Officer (penaksir terakhir di Kiosk) sebelum dimasukkan ke dalam ruang penyimpanan/brankas barang jaminan. 4. Bertanggung jawab melakukan approval pembiayaan sesuai dengan BWMP yang dimiliki/atau eskalasi approval dari BWMP limit GO dalam persetujuan pembiayaan. Benefit: 1. Gaji Pokok 2. Tunjangan Penaksiran 3. Insentif Target 4. Tunjangan Kendaraan Kesehatan 5. Tunjangan Komunikasi/Pulsa 6. Tunjangan Kesehatan 7. THR 2x Gaji

jobs.title: Partnership Executive Ecommerce | MAPCLUB
jobs.description: Acquire new business partners and manage existing partner relationships to build long-term strategic collaborations. Develop, implement, and manage partnership programs that drive revenue growth, membership acquisition and sales performance. Identify and pursue new business opportunities across various industries, including payment gateways, bnlp, e-commerce, retail, travel, and other strategic sectors. Promote and sell mapclub points as a B2B loyalty solution to support partners' customer acquisition, retention, and engagement strategies. Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, including Product, Marketing, Operations, Finance, and Technology, to ensure successful execution of partnership initiatives. Maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders and identify opportunities to expand existing partnerships and create new revenue streams.

jobs.title: Content Creator
jobs.description: About the Role: Howel & Co is looking for a full-time Content Creator to craft compelling content and bring our brand to life. In this role, you’ll be responsible for producing engaging social media content, including scripting and assisting with video production to create high-quality visuals that connect with our audience. Job Description: Research and brainstorm creative ideas to produce content for digital platforms, including videos and feed posts. Develop engaging stories and feed posts that align with Howel & Co's brand voice. Provide creative input to enhance our social media presence. Write compelling and on-brand copy for descriptions and other content. Assist the videographer in creating high-quality video content for social media.

jobs.description: Deskripsi Pekerjaan: 1. Bertanggung jawab mengakuisisi nasabah baru dan mengelola hubungan dengan nasabah lama untuk menggunakan layanan gadai atau pembiayaan berbasis emas. 2. ﻿﻿Bertanggung jawab untuk membangun dan membina calon nasabah potensial yang membutuhkan pembiayaan dengan jaminan emas sesuai dengan prosedur yang telah ditetapkan 3. ﻿﻿Menjelaskan perbedaan antara sistem gadai konvensional dan syariah, gadai emas (pendanaan) dan cicil/tabung emas (investasi) kepada masyarakat, serta prosedur taksiran. nasabah potensial yang membutuhkan pembiayaan dengan jaminan emas sesuai dengan prosedur yang telah ditetapkan 4. ﻿﻿Melakukan pengecekan fisik awal terhadap kualitas dan keaslian emas sebelum diproses oleh bagian penaksir. 5. Menjaga hubungan baik dengan nasabah agar nasabah melakukan perpanjangan (gadai ulang) atau pelunasan tepat waktu agar aset mereka tetap aman. 6. ﻿﻿Melakukan kegiatan pemasaran lapangan, spesifik tempat utama bisnis dilakukan (sales point) yakni di Kiosk, namun tidak terbatas dalam hal seperti membuka booth di pasar, mal, atau pengajian/komunitas. Benefit: 1. Gaji Pokok 2. Tunjangan Penaksiran 3. Insentif Target 4. Tunjangan Kendaraan Kesehatan 5. Tunjangan Komunikasi/Pulsa 6. Tunjangan Kesehatan 7. THR 2x Gaji

jobs.title: Quality Assurance Automation
jobs.description: Design, develop, and execute manual and automated test cases for web, mobile, and API applications. Analyze business requirements, user stories, and technical specifications to define test scenarios and test cases based on acceptance criteria and the Definition of Done (DoD). Perform functional, integration, regression, system, smoke, and sanity testing. Execute manual testing and support automation testing activities. Perform API testing to validate application functionality and data integrity. Identify, document, track, and verify software defects until resolution. Collaborate with Developers, Business Analysts, Product Owners, and Scrum teams throughout the software development lifecycle. Validate bug fixes and perform regression testing before production releases. Execute SQL queries to validate application data and database consistency. Participate in Agile ceremonies and contribute to continuous quality improvement. Prepare testing documentation, including test cases, execution reports, and defect reports. Ensure software quality standards are maintained throughout the development lifecycle.

jobs.title: Electrical Technician
jobs.description: Perform preventive, corrective, and emergency maintenance on building electrical systems and equipment. Inspect, troubleshoot, repair, and maintain electrical distribution panels, lighting systems, power outlets, generators, UPS, transformers, and related electrical installations. Monitor the performance of building electrical systems to ensure safe and reliable operation. Conduct routine inspections of electrical facilities and identify potential hazards or equipment failures. Support the maintenance of building systems, including HVAC, fire alarm systems, elevators, and building automation systems. Respond promptly to electrical breakdowns and emergency maintenance requests. Install, replace, and test electrical equipment and components as required.

jobs.title: Study Abroad Consultant
jobs.description: Are you passionate about helping students achieve their dreams of studying abroad? Do you have strong sales skills and the ability to provide expert guidance on overseas education opportunities? If you're a confident, customer-focused professional with a talent for building relationships and driving conversions, Indies wants YOU on our team! What You’ll Be Doing: End-to-End University Application Support: Assist students with every step of their university application, from selecting the right institution to writing compelling personal statements, preparing necessary documents, applying for visas, and providing university preparation guidance. Consult with Potential Customers: Guide prospective students and their families through study abroad options, scholarships, and admissions processes, helping them make informed decisions. Achieve Sales Targets: Engage with leads, address their concerns, and effectively convert them into paying customers. Build Trust and Long-Term Relationships: Maintain strong connections with students and families, ensuring satisfaction, referrals, and long-term engagement.

jobs.title: Content Production Specialist
jobs.description: Manage and grow social media for leading education brands! Gentem Lifelong Learning Indonesia is seeking a skilled Content Creator Specialist to develop and execute strategies that drive engagement and brand awareness across our diverse portfolio. If you thrive on storytelling, audience engagement, and performance-driven content strategies, we want you! What You’ll Be Doing: Content Shooting & Production: Capture high-quality photo and video content for all Gentem brands, including short-form, long-form, events, classes, and testimonials. Content Editing: Edit and finalise content for social media (Reels, TikTok, YouTube, carousels), including subtitles, pacing, basic motion, and platform optimisation. Content Ideation & Storytelling: Develop content ideas, hooks, scripts, and carousel narratives aligned with campaign direction and audience behaviour. Content Coordination & Asset Management: Coordinate shoots with internal teams and manage all content assets (raw and final) in an organised and accessible system Produce consistent social media content: Deliver regular photo, video, and carousel content for all Gentem brands across platforms. Improve content quality and engagement: Create visually strong, well-edited content that drives views, saves, and interactions. Support brand campaigns and objectives: Translate campaign ideas into execution-ready content (Reels, TikTok, YouTube, carousels). Maintain organised content workflow: Ensure all raw and final assets are properly stored, labelled, and accessible.

jobs.title: Merge and Acquisition
jobs.description: Manage corporate merger, acquisition, investment, and development activities Oversee the entire preparation process up to the Initial Public Offering (IPO) execution, including ensuring the company's readiness for a successful listing on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX). Formulate and manage the company's IPO roadmap in accordance with targets set by management. Coordinate with regulators, underwriters, auditors, legal counsels, and related parties during the IPO process. Ensure corporate readiness across financial, legal, governance, and operational aspects to fulfill public company requirements. Responsibilities Identify merger and acquisition opportunities. Conduct due diligence and business valuation. Prepare investment proposals and strategic partnership frameworks. Support IPO preparation and corporate fundraising initiatives. Core Competencies Financial Modeling. Business Valuation. Due Diligence. Corporate Finance. Negotiation. Strategic Thinking.

jobs.title: Human Capital Officer
jobs.description: Pemegang jabatan dalam posisi ini akan bertugas dan bertanggung jawab dalam pengelolaan fungsi manajemen sumber daya manusia di perusahaan dengan tanggung jawab utama sbb.: 1. Workforce Planning and Talent acquisition a. Merencanakan kebutuhan sumber daya manusia di perusahaan b. Mengelola proses rekrutmen untuk seluruh kebutuhan sumber daya manusia termasuk memastikan proses onboarding berjalan dengan baik di lingkungan perusahaan 2. Compensation & Benefits a. Mengelola dan memastikan siklus proses penggajian berjalan dengan baik dan benar b. Mengelola program kesejahteraan sumber daya manusia di perusahaan seperti BPJS, asuransi swasta, dan fasilitas benefit lainnya c. Melakukan evaluasi secara berkala untuk menjaga daya saing standar gaji dan benefit yang diberikan perusahaan 3. Performance and Talent Management a. Mendorong budaya kerja berbasis kinerja sekaligus mengelola sistem penilaian kinerja sumber daya manusia di perusahaan b. Mengidentifikasikan kebutuhan “teaching/training/coaching/counselling needs analysis” dan mengevaluasi efektivitas program pengembangan sumber daya manusia 4. Employee, Industrial Relations, and Compliance a. Memahami UU dan peraturan ketenagakerjaan yang berlaku b. Menjaga hubungan yang harmonis antara perusahaan, pekerja, dan instansi pemerintah terkait c. Menangani perselisihan hubungan industrial, tindakan disipliner, dan keluhan karyawan dengan baik dan benar

jobs.title: Corporate Relationship Specialist
jobs.description: Key Responsibilities Develop new business opportunities through prospecting, networking, referrals, and client outreach. Build and maintain strong relationships with HR, Learning & Development (L&D), and key business stakeholders. Conduct consultative sales meetings to identify client challenges and recommend suitable learning solutions. Deliver engaging sales presentations and customized proposals based on client needs. Manage the end-to-end sales cycle, including prospecting, proposal preparation, negotiation, closing, and after-sales relationship management. Grow and manage existing corporate accounts to drive renewals and long-term partnerships. Maintain accurate CRM records, sales pipeline, and activity reports. Collaborate with internal teams to ensure excellent customer experience and successful program delivery. Achieve individual sales targets and contribute to business growth.

GILL delivers premium, efficacious learning outcomes through exclusive partnerships with world-leading content providers and is heavily technology-enabled under separately branded businesses - Wall Street English, Genstarkids, and INDIES (Independent International Education Solutions). GILL Group was established with the acquisition of the Wall Street English Indonesia business in 2016 and now has over 5,000 active members learning online and in-center across its 11 locations. Genstarkids was launched in October 2025 with the first studio in Bintaro and the second in Cikarang. INDIES was soft-launched in June 2024. GILL also provides IELTS test prep courses as well as business english courses (professional skills) to both retail and corporate customers.
